prompt: Add IFNET NULL0 logical discard interface
note: Added built-in VVRP NULL0 IFNET interface with fixed IFNET index 0x0, permanent physical/protocol UP spoofing state, show interfaces/show ip interface visibility, shutdown rejection, and IPv4 configuration rejection. NULL0 is created inside IFNET and does not pass through DPlane or Ethernet import.

+

Persist IFNET operational status fields

+

Added persistent IFNET admin, physical, and protocol status fields. Interface snapshots now refresh physical/admin/protocol facts into IFNET state; IP updates protocol state before RM/FIB refresh; RM and DPlane input consume IFNET status accessors instead of rebuilding state ad hoc in show paths.
